description: Launch readiness audit for hx-list. Checklist: (1) A11y — axe-core zero violations, WCAG 2.1 AA. C-PATTERN-05: use div[role=list] not ul/ol with slotted WC children. (2) Astro doc page — all 12 template sections. (3) Individual export — standalone HTML works. (4) `npm run verify` passes. Files: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-list/`, `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-list.md`
